articles.author: James  LaPorta
articles.title: Iran appeared to surveil center where U.S. forces were killed in Kuwait, Army memo says - CBS News
articles.description: In the week before an Iranian retaliatory strike that killed six U.S. service members, Iranian intelligence was likely able to identify and track American forces, according to a memo reviewed by CBS News.
articles.content: Washington — In the week before an Iranian retaliatory strike that killed six American service members in Kuwait as the U.S.-Israeli war with Tehran began, Iranian intelligence was likely able to ide… [+7224 chars]
